description: Clean multi-speaker dialogue fixture for deriving Rakkr audio health fault permutations.
format: PCM signed 16-bit little-endian WAV, stereo, 48 kHz

turns.speaker: Maya
turns.text: Good morning. Rakkr loopback calibration is live. This clean voice should read as speech, steady, and unclipped.

turns.speaker: Jonah
turns.text: Channel two checking in. The room is quiet; no hum, static, or broadband noise should be present.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: This is the third speaker. Each turn is separated by a short pause, so the watchdog can measure recovery.

turns.speaker: Maya
turns.text: Use this golden file to derive low volume, clipping, hum, static, noise, and duplicate channel tests.
